Activité LoxBox propose des solutions innovantes 
basées sur la technologie : nous avons développé une 
plateforme nous permettant de gérer un réseau de points 
relais & consignes e-Relais. Nos consignes e-Relais sont le 
produit phare de LoxBox Services ; nous avons développé 
localement avec des compétences tunisiennes.
Aspect Technologique Notre e-Relais est opérationnel grâce 
à son système embarqué, son application dédiée et notre 
plateforme web LinX.
Originalité Visant l'automatisation du LastMile,LoxBox a 
mis en place une plateforme qui permet la gestion des 
étapes de livraison.
Activity LoxBox offers innovative solutions based on 
technology: we have developed a platform allowing us to 
manage a network of drop-off points & e-Relais lockers. 
Our e-Relais lockers are the flagship product of LoxBox 
Services; we have developed locally with Tunisian skills.
Technological Aspect Our e-Relais is operational thanks to 
its embedded system, its dedicated application and our 
LinX web platform.
Originality Aiming at the automation of the LastMile, 
LoxBox has set up a platform that allows the management 
of every step of the delivery process.

EN

products.name: LinX Delivery Management Platform
products.description: A platform to manage first and last‑mile deliveries, carrier communication, billing, statistics, multi‑agency management, ticketing, inventory, geolocation, COD, finance, fleet, subcontracting and API integration.

# **Looking for a Delivery Management Solution ?**
With our unique platform, you can seamlessly manage first and last-mile deliveries, including home delivery, pickup location delivery, and smart-locker delivery.
**(No Credit Card Needed)****
**
[Start For Free](https://loxbox.tn/CreateAccount.html) [Read More](https://loxbox.tn/SaaS-Platform.html#timeline3-21)
## **Why choose LinX?**
### App for your carriers
A dedicated app that facilitates management and communication with your carriers.
### Billing Module
Easily generate and track your invoices with our integrated module.
### Advanced Statistics
Analyze your performance to improve your operations.
### Multi-Agency
Manage multiple agencies in a centralized and efficient way.
### Ticketing System
Simplified tracking of requests and incidents for optimized support.
### Agency Inventory
Keep a precise eye on your stocks and inventories in each agency.
### Carrier Geolocation and Route Recording
Real-time tracking of routes and carrier locations.
### COD (Cash On Delivery) Management
Simplified tracking and management of payments on delivery.
### Finance Module
Automatic invoice generation and complete financial management.
### Fleet Management
Optimize and monitor your vehicle fleet efficiently.
### Subcontracting Module
Simple management of contractors and subcontractors.
### Up-to-date API Documentation
Full access to clear and regularly updated API documentation.

#####  **Our Story with LOXBOX**
Finding a platform for parcel management, shipping or a Transport Management System (TMS) is challenging, especially with multiple delivery methods.
Our Team took the challenge seriously and provided the most convenient solution for Logistics Companies, Marketplaces & Retailers, allowing the full parcel management & automation from creation, delivery to return phases.
Find out More about our story and how we began our journey as a Logistics Company by clicking the button below.
[Read More](https://loxbox.tn/)
